mapper.select:
SELECT fr.review_id, fr.content_id, fr.member_id, fr.rating, fr.content, fr.visit_date, NVL(fr.report_count, 0) AS report_count, fr.created_at, fr.updated_at, fr.is_deleted, m.nickname FROM festival_review fr LEFT JOIN member m ON fr.member_id = m.member_id WHERE fr.content_id = #{content_id} AND NVL(fr.is_deleted, 'N') = 'N'
ORDER BY fr.rating DESC, fr.created_at DESC
ORDER BY fr.created_at DESC
SELECT review_id, content_id, member_id, rating, content, visit_date, NVL(report_count, 0) AS report_count, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM festival_review WHERE review_id = #{review_id}
mapper.insert:
SELECT festival_review_seq.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO festival_review ( review_id, content_id, member_id, rating, content, visit_date, report_count, created_at, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{review_id}, #{content_id}, #{member_id}, #{rating}, #{content, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{visit_date}, 0, SYSDATE, 'N' )
mapper.update: UPDATE festival_review SET rating = #{rating}, content = #{content, jdbcType=CLOB}, visit_date = #{visit_date}, updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE review_id = #{review_id} AND member_id = #{member_id} AND NVL(is_deleted, 'N') = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT image_id, review_id, image_url, created_at FROM festival_review_image WHERE review_id = #{review_id} ORDER BY image_id ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT festival_review_image_seq.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO festival_review_image ( image_id, review_id, image_url, created_at ) VALUES ( #{image_id}, #{review_id}, #{image_url}, SYSDATE )

SELECT review_report_seq.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO review_report ( report_id, review_id, member_id, reason, created_at ) VALUES ( #{report_id}, #{review_id}, #{member_id}, #{reason}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM festival_review fr LEFT JOIN member m ON fr.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN festival_info fi ON fr.content_id = fi.content_id
AND NVL(fr.report_count, 0) >= 1 AND NVL(fr.is_deleted, 'N') = 'N'
AND fr.is_deleted = 'Y'
AND fr.rating = #{rating}
AND ( fr.content LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR m.nickname LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR TO_CHAR(fr.content_id) LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR fi.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
SELECT report_id, review_id, member_id, reason, created_at FROM review_report WHERE review_id = #{review_id} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE festival_review SET is_deleted = #{is_deleted}, updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE review_id = #{review_id}
